completed_slice: Added a fail-closed static contract and path-scoped CI gate for the exact GitHub environment name and Cloudflare secret references used by the deployment workflow.
remaining_blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, dispatch the deployment workflow, and retain the returned deployment URL plus signed proof artifacts.
next_action: Observe the new contract workflow result, then dispatch cloudflare-pages-research.yml only after the environment contract passes and credentials are configured.
claim_limit: This slice validates repository references only; it does not prove secret presence, secret validity, Cloudflare authorization, deployment, or served identity.
